titleStmt.title: SII 37.335: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 335. (A.R. No. B 444 of 1940-41.) Kalakaḍa, Vayalpad Taluk, Chittoor District.

summary.p: Front wall of the ruined Śiva temple.

It registers the remission of all taxes baring Dogarācha pannu, Paḍevāḷe pannu, Paḍiyēri pannu and Sandhi-vigrahi pannu to certain Kāṁpūs (names specified) of Vēnāṇḍu by the king on the occasion of his coronation. Also seems to record the regulations in respect of punishment for adultery and consequent murder. In characters of the 10th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastyanēka samara saṁghaṭṭanōpalabda vijayalakṣmī samāliṁgita viśāḷa
vakṣasthala bhuvana triṇētra śrīmadiruṁgeya mahārājuḷana paṭṭaṁbu gaṭṭina
santōsaṁbuna vēnāṇṭi kāṁpulaku dayasēsina sthiti dogarāca paṇṇnunnu paḍevāḷe
paṇnunuṁ paḍiyēri paṇnunnuṁ sandhivigrahi paṇṇnunuṁ veligānu ndakkaṁbaḍina tāvu
ṭdisaṁbu modalugānu jīṟucēṟaḷēllā vāyurādityaṁbu viḍicē dīninaṟisinavāṇḍu
Īguḍiyiniṁ bāranāsiyiṁ vṟaccinavāṇḍu Īsthiti vaḍasinavāru vēṁbaḷli
beyūrēkiyu celakālāyannayuṭikuṇḍa koṇḍeyayuṁ yēṭikuṟti candiyaṇna
yuṁ pulverisi rāmayyuvēparagāmuṇḍunuṁ rakkasagāmuṇḍunuṁ vrāsina vāṇu
kabbadakēsiyanna sēsinavāru dantiyōva janunabhinutā cariyuṁ maṁgaḷa

maṟiyunu malkoṇḍi cāmiyunu pērēyayu vaiṁppuri sirimurttigā muṇḍu
mṭākaṁṭi kommaṇa gāmuṇḍu nuṁkaṟiya kaṭṭi vaiduṁbaraṭṭōḍiyuveccali vaiduṁba
raṭaguḍliyuṁ vuddini kommaṇnayuṁ vēnāṇṭi dāsumaḷuṁkāriya puliyu

saṁdaṇa badiyiḷini
Aṭlokka campaka Aḷiyukku diṟici kaḍapinaṁnu miṇṇakakaḍapinaṁnu
magadoṇḍuvu Aṟuvāḍi nālugu gadyeḷugoṇuvāru dīnikiṁ barikṣavēya
Digital edition of SII 37.335 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
